title: ranunculus elbrusensis f. bungeanus
intro: Ranunculus elbrusensis f. bungeanus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family, and is native to the Caucasus region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus elbrusensis f. bungeanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the flowers and leaves, then using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
